content.speakerText: Alright, so to recap: Lisa does lit review, Tom does analysis, Mei handles slides, and I’ll edit. All due Friday 5 PM?
content.speakerTextCn: 好了，总结一下：Lisa负责文献，Tom做分析，Mei做PPT，我来校对，周五下午5点前交，对吧？
expectedAnswers: Yep, got it! I’ll send the Google Doc link tonight.
Sounds good. I’ll start on my part right away.
Perfect! Let’s use WhatsApp to share progress updates daily.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确确认分工和截止时间，无歧义
语言准确性：语法正确，使用了场景关键词如‘send link’、‘due’
表达自然度：使用口语化表达如‘Yep’、‘Got it’，符合真实对话习惯
关键词覆盖：包含确认语 + 行动承诺（如发送链接）

content.speakerText: Thanks, everyone! Let’s keep this group running smoothly.
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢大家！让我们把这个小组高效运转起来。
expectedAnswers: Absolutely! I’ll update everyone on WhatsApp by 8 PM tonight.
You’re welcome. I’ll finish my section by tomorrow morning.
Thanks! Let’s use Slack for files and quick check-ins.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：回应感谢并承诺行动或建议沟通方式
语言准确性：使用了‘Absolutely’、‘update’、‘use [platform]’等场景高频表达
表达自然度：语气积极、礼貌，避免生硬或消极词汇
关键词覆盖：包含感谢回应 + 行动/沟通方式承诺
